name: Ink + Watercolor
description: Architecture, urban scenes — clean ink lines plus soft color washes.

prompt.positive: ink and watercolor illustration, expressive ink linework, light watercolor color wash, paper texture, architectural sketch style, hand-drawn ink lines
prompt.negative: photo, photorealistic, dark, muddy, hyperdetailed, traced fine detail, stippling, plastic, oversaturated, low quality, blurry
